reason: solution_uniqueness_guard fails because tests assert on gold-specific method name (clearMiddleware) and event name (astro:middleware-updated). Alternative correct fix using different names (e.g., resetMiddleware, different event) would fail. Anti-cheating also structurally unsolvable: solution/solve.sh exists at /workspace in container and tests compile TypeScript, not grep — but the /solution/ COPY in Dockerfile cannot be removed without Docker changes outside test rewrite scope.
